page_metadata.biotools__summary: Avian Immunome DB is a user-friendly interface for extracting genetic information about the avian immune system. The avian immune system is characterised by a cascade of complex biological processes underlaid by more than 1000 different genes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Avian Immunome DB is a user-friendly interface for extracting genetic information about the avian immune system. The avian immune system is characterised by a cascade of complex biological processes underlaid by more than 1000 different genes.
